canonical_definition: The ability to comprehend and reason about video content that is presented as a continuous, unfolding stream over time, requiring integration of information across extended temporal contexts.
papers: SVBench: A Benchmark with Temporal Multi-Turn Dialogues for Streaming Video Understanding
Streaming Video Understanding and Multi-round Interaction with Memory-enhanced Knowledge
